name: Guiguzi

skills.name: The Laws of Nature
skills.description: After leaving the enemy's vision, the next Basic Attack deals extra damage and slows the enemy.

skills.name: Prophecy - Hidden Hand
skills.description: Gains a Movement Speed boost and camouflages himself, reducing the Physical and Magical Defense of enemies touched while dealing damage to them.

skills.name: The Animist
skills.description: Summons spriteflies, and after a brief delay, pulls in nearby enemies, dealing damage and stunning them. If he hits an enemy hero, he and nearby teammates gain a shield.

skills.name: Prophecy - Out of Sight
skills.description:
After 1s, camouflages and grants Movement Speed to himself and nearby teammates.
Gains vision of the nearest enemy hero.
The disguise breaks upon using Basic Attacks, skills, or actions that affect enemies.

skillsZh.name: 縱橫兵法
skillsZh.description: 脫離視野後強化下次普攻，造成額外傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 先知・神隱
skillsZh.description: 進入偽裝狀態並加速，減少被觸碰的敵人雙抗並造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 萬物有靈
skillsZh.description: 召喚玄微子，短暫延遲後拉扯周圍敵人對其造成傷害和暈眩，命中英雄時自身與周圍友軍獲得護盾。

skillsZh.name: 先知・霧隱
skillsZh.description:
1秒後，自身和附近友方英雄進入偽裝狀態，增加移動速度。
獲得最近敵方英雄視野。
使用普攻，技能或對敵方造成影響時解除偽裝狀態。

tips: Build: Crimson Shadow - Radiance, Frigid Charge, Glacial Buckler.
tipsZh: 鬼谷子（遊走）：梯度 B，勝率 52.07%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：極影・形昭、冰霜衝擊、極寒風暴.

patchHistory.change: Reduced cooldown and increased damage from his Passive.
patchHistory.detail: There were many calls to buff Guiguzi during the 'I'm a designer at HoK!' event in HoK Camp. Guiguzi players want to show off how good he can be, but don't always succeed. Hence, we have reduced some of his skill cooldowns to give them more opportunities to try.

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低冷卻時間，增加被動傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「在HOK CAMP的活動『我在HOK當企劃活動中』有很多加強鬼谷子的聲音。每位使用鬼谷子的召喚師都期待他能大放異彩，但並不是每一次嘗試都能夠成功，因此我們降低了他的技能冷卻時間，讓他有更多的嘗試的機會。」

faqs.question: Is Guiguzi good in current season?
faqs.answer: Guiguzi is Tier B Support with 52.07% win rate, 0.25% pick rate, and 0.28% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Guiguzi build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Crimson Shadow - Radiance, Frigid Charge, Glacial Buckler, Longnight Guardian, Sage's Sanctuary, Ardent Dominion.

faqs.question: How to counter Guiguzi?
faqs.answer: Pick Fatih, Wukong, Musashi. Strong into Li Xin, Mozi, Zilong.

faqsZh.question: 鬼谷子 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 鬼谷子 為 B 梯度，勝率 52.07%、選取 0.25%、禁用 0.28%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 鬼谷子 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：極影・形昭、冰霜衝擊、極寒風暴、永夜守護、賢者的庇護、熾熱支配.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 鬼谷子？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Fatih、Wukong、Musashi。鬼谷子 克制 Li Xin、Mozi、Zilong。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Li Xin, Mozi, Zilong. Weak into: Fatih, Wukong, Musashi.

guide.overview: Guiguzi is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.8% win rate and 0.3% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Guiguzi: Slips out of vision and enhances the next Basic Attack to inflict extra damage and slow.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Glacial Buckler, Longnight Guardian, then complete Ominous Premonition, Frigid Charge. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Guiguzi's Support kit. Take Smite & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Prophecy - Hidden Hand → The Animist → Prophecy - Out of Sight → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Prophecy - Out of Sight (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Prophecy - Hidden Hand, and Prophecy - Out of Sight on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Prophecy - Hidden Hand → The Animist → Prophecy - Out of Sight → weave basic attacks

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Guiguzi sits at Tier B globally (51.8% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Guiguzi vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Guiguzi has +5.7% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Guiguzi when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Guiguzi vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Guiguzi has +1.5% WR vs Cai Yan in Camp data. Choose Guiguzi when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Guiguzi excels into Li Xin, Mozi, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Fatih, Wukong, Musashi without team peel.
